def negative_module_cache_exposed_without_invalidation_boundary():
    rule_id = "module_cache_exposed_without_invalidation_boundary"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag modules that expose cache internals directly with no clear invalidation or ownership boundary."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
